description: You are an office clerk at Meridian Property Group. Format the three draft business letters in /home/ga/Documents/meridian_correspondence.odt into a modified-block business letter style. Each letter—the lease renewal for Blackwood & Associates LLC, the maintenance notice for Ms. Patricia Hensley, and the vendor termination for GreenScape Professional Services—must begin on a new page. Apply right-alignment to the sender address blocks, date lines, and closing blocks. Format the subject lines as bold and the body paragraphs with justified alignment. Save the changes to /home/ga/Documents/meridian_correspondence.odt.
